compiled_state.title: GREEN: Remove v2 migration docs and update remaining docs
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Remove v2 migration docs and update remaining doc references.

## Files to delete
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/adr-ticket-v3-event-sourced-storage.md
- plugins/dso/docs/ticket-migraiton-v3/ (entire directory)

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/tombstone-archive-format.md — remove .tickets/archive/ v2 references
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-sync-events-contract.md — update tk-sync-lib.sh reference to current script
- plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-allowlist.conf — remove v2 remnant note (lines 16-21)

## TDD Requirement
Exemption: static asset criterion 3 — Markdown documentation and config files with no executable behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Migration design doc deleted
  Verify: test ! -f plugins/dso/docs/designs/adr-ticket-v3-event-sourced-storage.md
- [ ] Migration docs directory deleted
  Verify: test ! -d plugins/dso/docs/ticket-migraiton-v3
- [ ] test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh 2>&1 | tail -1 | grep 'FAILED: 0'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## AMENDMENT: Expanded scope from gap analysis

### Additional files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md — update .tickets/ mention in diff hash documentation to .tickets-tracker/
- plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md — remove 3 tk wrapper/tk commands references, replace with ticket CLI
- plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md — remove tk <subcommand> documentation (line 12), update tk archive reference (line 544)
- plugins/dso/docs/MODEL-TIERS.md — replace "tk commands" with "ticket commands" in model tier table
- plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md — remove orphaned-tasks.sh from used-by fields (2 entries at lines 861, 1098)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
